title: As For Me And My House

sections.label: Intro
lines: Grey light walks across the floor
A slow tide finding the room
I have stood here at this door
With the old names in the gloom
Behind me runs the river that I crossed
Where my fathers bowed to stone and sand
Gods of Egypt, gods of dust
I lay them down, I lift an empty hand
And the morning opens like a door
Asking who, asking who I'm for

sections.label: Chorus
lines: As for me and my house
We will serve the Lord
As for me and my house
We will serve the Lord
Let the river take the rest
We will serve the Lord
In sincerity and truth
A low lamp in the night
I will teach these quiet rooms
The one name worth the light
Choose this day
Choose this day
Let the old gods wash away
Choose this day

sections.label: Final Chorus
lines: As for me and my house
We will serve the Lord
As for me and my house
We will serve the Lord
Let the river take the rest
We will serve the Lord

sections.label: Whispered
lines: We will serve
We will serve the Lord
This day
